faq.description: Everything you need to know about turning email into execution.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions

items.a1: Flowmail turns incoming emails into structured, actionable workflows. Instead of manually reading and sorting emails, it automatically extracts approvals, reports, and key updates so you can act immediately.
items.q2: How does Flowmail connect to my email?
items.a2: Flowmail connects securely via OAuth to providers like Gmail or Outlook. You can choose what access to grant, and revoke it at any time.
items.q3: What can Flowmail actually do with my emails?
items.a3: Flowmail can classify emails, extract structured data (like approvals or report updates), and let you or your agents take action — such as approving requests or tracking progress.
items.a4: Any MCP-compatible agent can integrate with Flowmail, including tools like Claude, Cursor, or your own custom agents.
items.a5: Yes. Flowmail only accesses data you explicitly authorize, and we do not use your email content for training without permission. You remain in full control of your data.
items.q6: Do I need to change my workflow?
items.a6: No. Flowmail works with your existing email flow. Emails still arrive as usual — Flowmail simply makes them structured and actionable.

hero.headline: When was the last time an important email slipped through?
hero.subtitle: Flowmail uses AI to classify every email, build timelines for every business item, and remind you before deadlines slip — so nothing gets lost in your inbox.
hero.subtitle2: Work still arrives by email. Flowmail turns it into execution.
hero.invite_error: Invalid invite code. Check and try again.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Three steps from email to action
howItWorks.description: Connect your inbox and let AI handle the rest.

step1.title: Connect
step1.description: Link your Gmail, Outlook, Feishu, or any IMAP inbox in one click.

step2.title: Understand
step2.description: AI classifies emails, extracts key fields, and creates structured items.

step3.title: Execute
step3.description: Approve requests, track reports, and trigger actions — all from one place.

notifications.label: Smart Notifications
notifications.title: Never forget. We'll remind you.
notifications.description: Flowmail proactively monitors every business item and alerts you before things fall through the cracks.

approval.title: Approval Deadline Alerts
approval.description: When an approval request approaches its deadline without action, Flowmail automatically reminds the approver via email and IM — no more expired requests.

anomaly.title: Report Anomaly Warnings
anomaly.description: When a status report reveals blockers, missed targets, or risk signals, Flowmail instantly notifies stakeholders so issues get addressed early.

timeline.title: Timeline Change Notifications
timeline.description: Every status change — approved, rejected, escalated, completed — is pushed to your email and team channels in real time.

bottomCta.title: Turn email into execution
bottomCta.subtitle: Connect your inbox in 30 seconds. Let AI handle the rest.

features.label: Core scenarios
features.title: Two workflows that matter most
features.description: Flowmail focuses on the two workflows that consume the most email time: approvals and report tracking.

inbox.title: Auto-triage your inbox
inbox.subtitle: AI classifies emails into actionable categories.
inbox.description: Flowmail uses AI to automatically classify emails into approvals, reports, issues, and other actionable workflows — no manual sorting needed.
inbox.b1d: AI reads every incoming email and categorizes it as an approval, report, issue, or feedback — with confidence scores.
inbox.b2d: No more folders, labels, or rules. Flowmail understands intent and routes emails to the right workflow automatically.
inbox.b3d: Classification improves over time as Flowmail learns your team's patterns and email conventions.

actions.title: Approve once, execute everywhere
actions.subtitle: One click triggers a full execution chain.
actions.description: Approve a request and Flowmail handles the rest — sends a confirmation email, creates a calendar event, and notifies your team on Slack or Feishu. No copy-pasting between apps.
actions.b1d: Review extracted details (amount, requester, deadline) and approve or reject from a single dashboard. Full audit trail included.
actions.b2d: After approval, Flowmail sends a confirmation email and creates calendar events automatically. No manual follow-up needed.
actions.b3d: Push approval results to Slack, Feishu, or Teams channels. Keep your team in the loop without leaving your inbox.

insights.title: Turn reports into tasks automatically
insights.subtitle: Extract, analyze, and create follow-ups in one step.
insights.description: Flowmail extracts progress, blockers, owners, and next steps from status emails, then creates tasks in Linear, Jira, or Notion — so nothing falls through the cracks.
insights.b1d: Key points, completed items, blockers, and next actions are pulled from free-text emails into structured fields.
insights.b2d: Blockers and action items are automatically turned into tickets in Linear, Jira, or Notion. Assigned to the right owner.
insights.b3d: Compare this week's report to last week. Spot risks early, track resolution rates, and see project health at a glance.

agents.title: Let agents run the whole pipeline
agents.subtitle: MCP tools for classification, approval, and execution.
agents.description: Flowmail exposes MCP tools for the full lifecycle — classify, approve, create calendar events, assign tasks, send notifications. Any compatible agent can run it end-to-end.
agents.b1d: Not just read-only. Agents can approve requests, create events, assign tasks, and send notifications through Flowmail's MCP server.
agents.b2d: Claude, Cursor, OpenClaw, or your own custom agents. If it speaks MCP, it can operate Flowmail end-to-end.
agents.b3d: Agents handle routine workflows; humans review edge cases. Confidence scores ensure nothing slips through unchecked.

security.label: Enterprise-grade Security
security.title: Your data is safe with us
security.description: Flowmail is built with security-first architecture. We protect your email data with industry-standard encryption, strict access controls, and comprehensive audit logging.

encryption.title: AES-256 Encryption
encryption.description: All sensitive credentials — OAuth tokens, IMAP passwords, and API secrets — are encrypted at rest using AES-256-GCM.

accessControl.title: Role-based Access
accessControl.description: Organization-level isolation with role-based permissions. Every API request is authenticated and authorized.

auditLog.title: Full Audit Trail
auditLog.description: Every sensitive operation — approvals, status changes, token usage — is logged with timestamps, actor, and IP address.

rateLimiting.title: Rate Limiting
rateLimiting.description: Built-in protection against brute-force attacks with intelligent rate limiting on all authentication endpoints.

headers.title: Security Headers
headers.description: HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, and strict referrer policies protect against XSS, clickjacking, and injection attacks.

mfa.title: Multi-factor Auth
mfa.description: Passkeys, TOTP two-factor authentication, and email OTP verification keep your accounts secure.

hero.title: Safe, secure, and private.
hero.description: Everything in Flowmail is designed to keep your work safe and secure. Because your business is nobody else's business.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.description: Your email data is protected at every layer with industry-standard encryption and secure infrastructure.

encryptionAtRest.title: Encryption at rest
encryptionAtRest.description: All sensitive credentials — OAuth tokens, IMAP passwords, and API secrets — are encrypted using AES-256-GCM before storage.

encryptionInTransit.title: Encryption in transit
encryptionInTransit.description: All connections are forced over HTTPS with TLS 1.2+. Strict security headers (HSTS, CSP) are enforced on every response.

oauthSecurity.title: OAuth 2.0 authorization
oauthSecurity.description: We connect to Gmail and Outlook via OAuth 2.0 — we never see or store your email password. You can revoke access at any time.

accessControl.title: Access Control
accessControl.description: Fine-grained permissions and multi-factor authentication protect every account.

mfa.title: Multi-factor authentication
mfa.description: Email OTP and Passkey support provide strong second-factor authentication for all user accounts.

orgIsolation.title: Organization isolation
orgIsolation.description: Each organization's data is strictly isolated. Cross-tenant access is impossible by design.

apiTokens.title: API token management
apiTokens.description: API tokens are hashed with SHA-256 before storage. Tokens can be scoped and revoked at any time.

rateLimiting.title: Rate limiting
rateLimiting.description: All authentication endpoints are protected with sliding-window rate limiting to prevent brute-force attacks.

aiPrivacy.title: AI & Privacy
aiPrivacy.description: We believe your email data belongs to you — not to AI model providers.

zeroTraining.title: Zero data training
zeroTraining.description: Your email content is never used to train, fine-tune, or improve AI models. We enforce zero-data-retention policies with our AI providers.

minimalAccess.title: Minimal data access
minimalAccess.description: AI only processes the specific fields needed for classification and extraction. Raw email content is not stored beyond processing.

transparency.title: Processing transparency
transparency.description: Every AI classification and extraction result is visible to you. You can review, correct, or reject any AI-generated output before it takes effect.

compliance.title: Compliance & Transparency
compliance.description: We protect your rights through rigorous internal controls and transparent data handling practices.

gdpr.title: GDPR Ready
gdpr.description: We follow core GDPR principles: data minimization, purpose limitation, and data subject rights. Data export and deletion supported. DPA available upon request.

zeroTraining.title: Zero data training
zeroTraining.description: Your email content is never used to train or improve AI models. We enforce zero-data-retention policies with all AI providers.

auditLog.title: Comprehensive audit logging
auditLog.description: All sensitive operations — approvals, connection changes, token management — are logged with actor, timestamp, and IP address.

dataExport.title: Data portability
dataExport.description: You can export or delete your data at any time. We respect your right to data portability and erasure.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Flowmail runs on enterprise-grade infrastructure with built-in redundancy and global performance.

hosting.title: Vercel hosting
hosting.description: Deployed on Vercel's global edge network with automatic DDoS protection, SSL, and 99.99% uptime SLA.

database.title: Managed PostgreSQL
database.description: Data is stored in Neon serverless PostgreSQL with automatic backups, point-in-time recovery, and encryption at rest.

securityHeaders.title: Security headers
securityHeaders.description: Every response includes HSTS, Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, and strict Referrer-Policy.

cta.title: Have security questions?
cta.description: We take security seriously. If you have questions about our security practices or need a DPA, please reach out.

setupGuide.title: Getting Started
setupGuide.completedMessage: You're all set to use Flowmail

steps.connectEmailHint: Go to "Email Connections" and click "Connect Mailbox" to authorize via OAuth
steps.configureCategoriesHint: Go to "Category Management" and click "New Category" to add AI rules
steps.processFirstEmailHint: Check the "Inbox" to see AI-parsed email items
steps.checkNotificationsHint: Click the bell icon in the top right to view system alerts

inbox.title: ① Smart Inbox
inbox.description: Once your mailbox is connected, AI automatically analyzes every email and extracts business items like approvals and reports. They all appear here — click any item to view details and its full timeline.

connections.title: ② Connect Your Mailbox
connections.description: Click here to go to the mailbox connection page. Supports Gmail, Feishu, DingTalk, WeCom, and more. Just one OAuth authorization and Flowmail will automatically sync and process your emails.

categories.title: ③ Custom Classification Rules
categories.description: Go to classification management to create your own categories. Each category can have AI prompts like "identify all approval request emails". AI will automatically sort emails based on your rules.

notifications.title: ④ Smart Notification Center
notifications.description: Flowmail proactively notifies you at critical moments — approval deadlines, overdue reports, and more. Click the bell anytime to view all alerts and never miss anything important.

aiEyes.panelSubtitle: I noticed you might need some help
